key_requirements: Documents [sdd.issue_platform] schema — the new [sdd.repo_platform] section follows the same structural pattern
config upsert logic (strip_toml_sections) and interactive wizard in platform set must be extended to cover repo_platform
PlatformConfig::load() and SddSection in services/platform_sync/config.rs show the TOML deserialization pattern to mirror for RepoPlatformConfig
Defines the merge flowchart and archive step where auto_commit and auto_pr must be injected
Post-archive git operations (stage all dirty under cclab/, commit, create PR) extend the terminal MergeComplete step
Frontmatter stripping table and audit logging patterns inform how git results should be surfaced
Defines SddConfig struct fields — repo_platform field must be added to SddConfig so create_change_merge.rs can read it via SddConfig::load_validated()
Envfile resolution order (global → provider-specific) applies to repo_platform auth too
sdd_workflow_create_change_merge is the tool extended with auto_commit and auto_pr post-archive steps
Response schema may need new fields: git_commit_sha, pr_url, git_status to surface post-merge git results
cclab sdd platform set wizard must be extended to configure [sdd.repo_platform] in addition to [sdd.issue_platform]
cclab sdd platform show must display repo_platform config alongside issue_platform
Authentication resolution order (env var → .env file → gh CLI fallback) is the same pattern used for repo_platform auth
GitHub API + gh CLI dual-transport pattern (reqwest or gh subprocess) applies to auto_pr PR creation
ChangeMergeCreated → ChangeArchived transition context; git operations happen after ChangeArchived is set
User-invoked merge skill that calls sdd_workflow_create_change_merge; auto_commit/auto_pr results should be included in skill output
